name: Rosenkohl in Bier Gedunstet (Brussels Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and wash the Brussels sprouts.
2. Place the sprouts in a medium-sized saucepan.
3. Pour enough beer over them to cover.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until tender.
5. Add more beer if needed as liquid evaporates.
6. Drain; add salt and butter.
7. Serve hot.
